finding_results.notes: Roughened Malik's boundary-setting in the bus exchange and bed aftermath into shorter, more colloquial lines while preserving consent clarity and his refusal to be treated as an anonymous escape hatch.
finding_results.summary: Malik's pressure dialogue now lands through briefer, rougher questions and warnings instead of stacking polished diagnostic speeches.

summary: Revised Malik's key dialogue beats to preserve boundary clarity and consent while making his voice less script-polished and more tired, local, and pressure-true.
